title: Optimal File Management Suggestions
excerpt: Looking for recommendations on the most optimal file management system using Monday.  Is it best to house documents in google drive and then link them to a Monday file column or …?

posts.author: mondayfunday (Yvette G)
posts.cookedHtml: Looking for recommendations on the most optimal file management system using Monday. Is it best to house documents in google drive and then link them to a Monday file column or …?

posts.author: kevin_vaghasiya (kevin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there! With DriveSync integration, you can easily connect your board items and files to Google Drive.
Whenever you create a new item, DriveSync will automatically create a folder for it in Google Drive. Plus, it will make sure that the files from your items get copied into their respective Google Drive folders too.
This was you can have optimal file management system.

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@mondayfunday,
if you already use Google Drive for file storage and collaboration. It’s easy to link Google Drive files to Monday boards, and you can still take advantage of all the features that Google Drive offers, such as version control and commenting.

Hope its helpful to u
